subject: feat(import): add ML-based auto-tagging via zero-shot classification
body:
Add in-browser tag suggestions using a pre-trained zero-shot classifier
(MoritzLaurer/xtremedistil-l6-h256-zeroshot-v1.1-all-33, ~13MB quantized).
During import Step 2, unmatched transaction groups get tag suggestions
derived from the user's existing tag vocabulary as candidate labels.

Architecture: Web Worker runs Transformers.js off the main thread. Singleton
composable (useTagSuggestions) manages lazy model loading, caching (via
browser Cache API), and inference. Graceful degradation — no tags in cache
means no model loaded, no suggestions shown, zero impact on existing flow.

New files:
- src/ml/types.ts — shared message types
- src/ml/tagSuggestionWorker.ts — Web Worker with zero-shot pipeline
- src/ml/useTagSuggestions.ts — Vue composable
- src/components/TagSuggestions.vue — suggestion chip UI

Tags: import, ml, ux, tags, zero-shot, transformers-js
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: auto-tagging
